n: Chapter 5.3: The Mighty Court of Máttugard

steps.t: Glóin is north of Maergrind, the Noble Gate, in Máttugard, down one level. Durin put Glóin in charge of scouting the mighty court, and asked you to ai…
Glóin asked you to defeat several different enemies lurking within Máttugard, and to search for relics from the Sixth War of Dwarves and Orcs, when la…
Glóin is north of Maergrind in Máttugard.
